mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, STEP_NO, STEP_TYPE, APPROVER_EMP_CODE, IS_FINAL, STATUS, DECISION_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, #{stepNo}, #{stepType}, #{approverEmpCode}, #{isFinal}, #{status}, CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') THEN GETDATE() ELSE NULL END, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.select: SELECT a.COMPANY AS company, a.REQ_ID AS requestId, a.STEP_NO AS stepNo, a.STEP_TYPE AS stepType, a.APPROVER_EMP_CODE AS approverEmpCode, h.EMP_NAME AS approverName, a.IS_FINAL AS isFinal, a.STATUS AS status, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), a.DECISION_AT, 120) AS decisionAt, a.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 a LEFT JOIN HRIMASTER01 h ON a.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND a.APPROVER_EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE WHERE a.REQ_ID = #{requestId} ORDER BY a.STEP_NO
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND STEP_TYPE = 'APPROVE' AND STATUS = 'APPROVED'
